title: sugkatatithemai #4784
definition:
1) to deposit together with another
 2) to deposit one's vote in the urn with another
 3) to consent to, vote for, agree with
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to deposit together with another
 2) to deposit one's vote in the urn with another
 3) to consent to, vote for, agree with

    NASB:  to deposit together, hence to agree with:
